files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,21 @@
+{
+  "ignorePatterns": [
+    "src/types/**/*.d.ts"
+  ],
+  "rules": {
+    "no-unused-vars": [
+      "warn",
+      {
+        "argsIgnorePattern": "^_",
+        "caughtErrorsIgnorePattern": "^_",
+        "varsIgnorePattern": "^_"
+      }
+    ],
+    "no-empty-pattern": "off",
+    "no-unassigned-vars": "off",
+    "no-unused-expressions": "off",
+    "no-control-regex": "off"
+    ,
+    "unicorn/no-useless-fallback-in-spread": "off"
+  }
+}

@@ -10,14 +10,14 @@
     "install": "node-gyp rebuild"
   },
   "dependencies": {
-    "node-addon-api": "^7.1.0"
+    "node-addon-api": "^8.5.0"
   },
   "devDependencies": {
-    "@types/node": "^24.0.3",
-    "node-gyp": "^11.0.0",
+    "@types/node": "^25.0.3",
+    "node-gyp": "^12.1.0",
     "prebuild": "^13.0.1",
-    "rimraf": "^5.0.5",
-    "typescript": "^5.8.3"
+    "rimraf": "^6.1.2",
+    "typescript": "^5.9.3"
   },
   "gypfile": true,
   "license": "MIT"

@@ -48,9 +48,10 @@
     "postinstall": "node scripts/postinstall-npm.js",
     "prebuild": "echo 'Skipping prebuild - handled by build-npm.js'",
     "prebuild:upload": "echo 'Skipping prebuild:upload - not used'",
-    "lint": "concurrently -n biome,tsc-server,tsc-client,tsc-sw \"biome check src\" \"tsc --noEmit --project tsconfig.server.json\" \"tsc --noEmit --project tsconfig.client.json\" \"tsc --noEmit --project tsconfig.sw.json\"",
+    "lint": "biome check src",
     "lint:fix": "biome check src --write",
-    "lint:biome": "biome check src",
+    "lint:biome": "pnpm run lint",
+    "lint:typeaware": "oxlint --config ./.oxlintrc.json --deny-warnings src && tsgo --noEmit --project tsconfig.server.json && tsgo --noEmit --project tsconfig.client.json && tsgo --noEmit --project tsconfig.sw.json",
     "typecheck": "concurrently -n server,client,sw \"tsc --noEmit --project tsconfig.server.json\" \"tsc --noEmit --project tsconfig.client.json\" \"tsc --noEmit --project tsconfig.sw.json\"",
     "pretest": "node scripts/ensure-native-modules.js",
     "test": "vitest",

@@ -6,6 +6,7 @@
 # Create temporary files for capturing output
 FORMAT_OUT=$(mktemp)
 LINT_OUT=$(mktemp)
+LINT_TYPEAWARE_OUT=$(mktemp)
 TYPECHECK_OUT=$(mktemp)
 VT_OUT=$(mktemp)
 
@@ -32,6 +33,16 @@ pids+=($!)
 } &
 pids+=($!)
 
+# Run type-aware lint CHECK in parallel
+{
+    if ! pnpm run lint:typeaware > "$LINT_TYPEAWARE_OUT" 2>&1; then
+        echo "Type-aware lint check failed:"
+        cat "$LINT_TYPEAWARE_OUT"
+        exit 1
+    fi
+} &
+pids+=($!)
+
 # Run typecheck in parallel (doesn't modify files)
 {
     if ! pnpm run typecheck > "$TYPECHECK_OUT" 2>&1; then
@@ -61,9 +72,9 @@ for pid in "${pids[@]}"; do
 done
 
 # Cleanup
-rm -f "$FORMAT_OUT" "$LINT_OUT" "$TYPECHECK_OUT" "$VT_OUT"
+rm -f "$FORMAT_OUT" "$LINT_OUT" "$LINT_TYPEAWARE_OUT" "$TYPECHECK_OUT" "$VT_OUT"
 
 # Exit with appropriate code
 if [ "$failed" = true ]; then
     exit 1
-fi
\ No newline at end of file
+fi
